us_equities.prose: Stocks rebounded broadly after the U.S. and Iran signed an interim peace agreement, with small-cap and large-cap indices both participating in the risk-on move.

cited_sources.title: U.S. Stocks Poised to Close Week on Strong Note

rates_and_dollar.prose: Treasury yields and the dollar rose after the Federal Reserve held rates in a unanimous decision at Kevin Warsh's first meeting as Fed chairman, with markets pricing in a higher-for-longer rate outlook.

cited_sources.title: Treasury Yields, Dollar Rise on First Fed Move Under Warsh

commodities.prose: Oil edged higher on the week after Vice President Vance postponed travel to Switzerland for Iran talks, injecting uncertainty into the peace process, while gold retreated as geopolitical risk eased following the U.S.-Iran interim agreement.

cited_sources.title: Oil Rises After Vance Postpones Travel to Switzerland For Iran Talks

stock:SPCX.prose: SpaceX shares surged following the company's historic market debut, which was described as the biggest IPO in market history and minted a trillionaire, driving intense investor demand including a land grab in leveraged ETFs.

cited_sources.title: The riskiest SpaceX stock trade of all had a big first week
